ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "property_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property type (e.g., Single Family, Condominium) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the property is situated */,
  "market_value" REAL /* Current market value of the property */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the market value was last updated */,
  "property_size" REAL /* Size of the property in square feet */,
  "property_age" INTEGER /* Age of the property in years */,
  "number_of_bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "number_of_bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "construction_type" TEXT /* Type of construction (e.g., wood, steel, brick) */,
  "parking_facilities" TEXT /* Parking facilities available (e.g., garage, street parking) */,
  "security_features" TEXT /* Security features (e.g., alarm system, CCTV cameras) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_property_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_type_id") REFERENCES property_types ("property_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_types" (
  "property_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property type */,
  "property_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the property type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property type */,
  "average_price_range" TEXT /* Average price range for the property type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "neighborhood" TEXT /* Neighborhood where the location is situated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend */,
  "property_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property type */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the market trend is recorded */,
  "market_statistic" REAL /* Market statistic (e.g., percentage of properties in foreclosure) */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the market trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_property_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_type_id") REFERENCES property_types ("property_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, investor, administrator) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "property_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property type */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the prediction is made */,
  "predicted_statistic" REAL /* Predicted market statistic */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction (0-1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_property_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_type_id") REFERENCES property_types ("property_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property to which the image belongs */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "image_caption" TEXT /* Caption for the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_images_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the property (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_history" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date when the sale occurred */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price at which the property was sold */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seller */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_history_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_history_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_history_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
